productName: Honey Stixx - 2pk - Live Resin Infused Preroll - Crystal - Purple Planet X Grape Ape
description: This infused indica pre-roll wraps Purple Planet X Grape Ape flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of grape, berry, and sweet, with settle-in, melt-into-the-couch ease. A little goes a long way.
